subcodes.title: Words spoken to Miss St. in Aug 1910
subcodes.first_line: Das schönste Pentagramm umfaßt: Liebe, Arbeit, Gebet, Friede und Freude.  Jage täglich seiner Verwirklichung nach!
subcodes.subjects: @lists; enumerations of Baha'i principles, @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion, @the state of prayer; dynamics of prayer, @work as worship
